description: Standalone SAR-ADC design-space exploration config for the 3-bit FreePDK45 example. Varies the comparator input-pair width, the tail-current device width, and the matched CDAC unit-cap groups, then Pareto-selects on static linearity vs. power. Run: `circuit-opt adc examples/freepdk45_sar3.json --explore examples/freepdk45_sar3_explore.json -n 16 --workers 4`.
